title: Olympia C121 Kelso Teaspoon (Pack of 12)
features: SLEEK DESIGN: High-polish finish of Olympia Kelso Teaspoon adds a touch of elegance to your dining, tea coffee experience
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Made from 18/0 stainless steel, these teaspoons provide excellent durability for everyday use
COST-EFFECTIVE: With an uncomplicated design, these spoons offer great value for money & excellent cost-per-use
MAGNETIC CUTLERY SAVING SYSTEM: 18/0 steel is magnetic, making it ideal for use with magnetic cutlery saving systems in busy kitchens
PACK OF 12: Perfect for topping-up your cutlery collection or starting a new one, these teaspoons come in a pack of 12
MATCH YOUR TABLEWARE: Designed to pair with other Kelso cutlery providing consistency to your table settings
EASY TO CLEAN & STORE: These spoons are easy to clean and dry after use allowing for a fast turnaround of fresh cutlery
description: From the manufacturer Olympia Kelso Teaspoon Affordable without compromising on quality, the Kelso teaspoon from Olympia is a reliable utensil perfect for any high volume catering business. Boasting an uncomplicated yet sleek design, the spoon can perfectly complement any establishments' furnishings with its high polish finish - sure to spruce up your dining room. The stainless-steel construction provides excellent durability to general wear and tear, and can be used with any magnetised cutlery saving system, reducing lost utensils and saving money on replacements. Features: High-polish finish adds a premium look Simple, uncomplicated design is ideal for bars, cafes or bistros 18/0 stainless steel provides long-lasting cutlery 18/0 steel is also magnetic, which is ideal for use with magnetic cutlery saving systems Pack of 12 ensures that you have cutlery spare for customers to use Ideal for use with other Kelso cutlery to keep consistent tableware Easy to clean and dry after use for a fast turnaround of fresh cutlery
